There are plenty of ways to play music in your car -- a CD player, MP3 player, iPhone or Android phone, and so on. If you' got an old car without any sort of audio input, though, Microsoft Research has an idea for how you can hook up your handset: the HoloTone . HoloTone is actually a pair of devices that sit in front of your windows and beam sound out into the open. The first one sits on the outside (with suction cups) and emits holographic "beacons" -- basically, it projects patterns around 3D space. A second device inside your car picks up these beacons ... The purpose of this paper is to provide a review of the Lyapunov inequality and its applications, as well as to present some new results and generalizations. We will also discuss the relationship between the Lyapunov inequality and other topics in differential equations, such as oscillation theory and stability theo

texts.full_text: a single exposure to LPS showed increased plasma levels of ACTH, CORT, PRL, TNF-alpha and also 24 h food intake (FI). Conversely in the repeated-LPS group FI was reduced while hormone secretion remained unchanged compared to controls. In situ hybridization studies revealed that proopiomelanocortin mRNA expression within arcuate nucleus increased following a single LPS injection but not after multiple administrations, whereas agouti-related peptide and neuropeptide Y mRNAs levels were unaffected by the treatments in this area as well as orexin A gene transcription was unaltered. In contrast corticotropin-releasing hormone (CRH) mRNA expression within paraventricular nucleus increased following both single or repeated LPS injections, whereas vasopressine and oxytocin mRNAs levels were unaffected by the treatments in this area. Comparative studies numbered six trials. They all followed the samepattern, comparing fertiloscopy and laparoscopy in terms of diagnostic and operative outcomes, procedural time, and patient discomfort. The outcomes of these studies suggest that fertiloscopy, while being less invasive and having a shorter procedural time, can achieve diagnostic and operative outcomes that are comparable to laparoscopy. However, fertiloscopy's ability to fully assess and manage extra-tubal pelvic pathology, such as endometriosis, is more limited compared to laparoscopy. Patient discomfort and recovery time are generally more favorable with fertiloscopy, which is often performed under local anesthesia and as an outpatient procedure, reducing the need for hospitalization and anesthesia. texts.full_text: activities. Self-care is a complex set of behaviors and actions performed by an individual to maintain health, prevent illness, and manage symptoms when illness occurs. In the context of heart failure, self-care encompasses a range of activities aimed at managing symptoms, improving quality of life, and preventing the exacerbation of the condition. 1. Medication Management: Patients with heart failure are often prescribed multiple medications to manage symptoms and prevent complications. Adherence to prescribed medication regimens is crucial for maintaining stability and preventing hospitalizations. 2. Diet and Nutrition: A heart-healthy diet rich in fruits, vegetables, lean proteins, and whole grains is essential for managing heart failure. Reducing sodium intake, limiting fluid intake, and avoiding alcohol can also help control symptoms and prevent decompensation. 3. Physical Activity: Regular physical activity, as recommended by healthcare providers, can improve cardiovascular fitness, reduce fatigue, and enhance overall well-being. Activities should be tailored to individual capabilities and may include walking, swimming, or other low-impact exercises. 4. Weight Management: Maintaining a healthy weight is important for reducing the burden on the heart. For patients with heart failure, this may involve monitoring caloric intake and engaging in regular physical activity to promote weight loss or management. 5. Monitoring Symptoms: Patients should be trained to monitor their symptoms, such as shortness of breath, swelling, and fatigue, and report any changes to their healthcare provider promptly. Keeping a symptom diary can be helpful in tracking progress and identifying potential issues early. 6. Stress Management: Chronic stress can exacerbate heart failure symptoms. Techniques such as mindfulness, meditation, deep breathing exercises, and other relaxation strategies can help manage stress levels and improve

It said their decisions, actions and inaction caused such losses to the bank. NABARD's audit report revealed breach of several banking laws and the Reserve Bank of India guidelines by the accused in distribution of loans to sugar factories and spinning mills, and the subsequent default on repayment and recovery of such loans. At that time, Pawar was the director of the bank. However,despite the inspection reports, no FIR was filed in the case. Local activist Surinder Arora filed a complaint with the EOW in the case in 2015 and approached the high court, seeking that an FIR be registered. On Thursday, the high court held that prima facie, the Nabard's inspection report, the complaint, and the charge sheet under the MCS Act showed there existed "credible evidence" against the accused in the case

texts.full_text: and turned to writing on a larger scale. In 1938 he was awarded the Gold Medal of the Royal Society of Medicine. He died in Blackmoor, Hampshire in 1939. The Collected Papers of Wilfred Trotter, an anthology of his final essays, appeared two years after his death. TrOtter was also the surgeon, at University College London for whom Wilfred Bion worked as a resident in his own medical training, before he famously studied groups and trained as a psychoanalyst at the Tavistock Clinic. In her account of Bion's life "The Days of our Years," his wife, Francesca, writes of the great influence Trotter had on the direction of Bion's work on group relations. Edward Bernays, author of Propaganda and nephew of Freud's, also refers to Trotter and Gustave Le Bon in his writings. Trotter met Sigmund Freud several times. According to Ernest Jones (Freud's first biographer), "he was one of the first two or three in england to appreciate the significance of Freud's work, which I came to know through him. He was one of the rapidly diminishing group who attended the first International Congress at Salzburg in 1908". Major works

texts.full_text: y[n, qr[[1]]], qr[[2]]]] ] ]; Usage. list = Range[100]; p1 = partition[list, 25]; Length /@ p1 Developer`PackedArrayQ /@ p1 (* {25, 25, 25, 25} *) (* {True, True, True, True} *) p2 = partition[list, 30]; Length /@ p2 Developer`PackedArrayQ /@ p2 (* {30, 30, 30, 10} *) (* {True, True, True, True} *) A: I think that the answer for Question 1 is that Partition doesn't only return packed subarrays, it returns a complete packed array. Developer`PackedArrayQ @ Partition[arr, 25000] (* True *) When it can't keep everything packed, it gives up and fully unpacks everything. This of course doesn't mean that it couldn't in principle behave in a smarter way. The best solutions I found to Question 2 are unfortunately still not very simple, so suggestions are welcome. I didn't find the solution to be trivial, so I thought it is worth sharing: Clear[part] part[arr_, n_] /; Divisible[Length[arr], n] := Partition[arr, n] part[arr_, n_] := Join[ Partition[arr, n, n, {1, -1}], {Take[arr, -Mod[Length[arr], n]]} ] This seems simple, but you may simplify this further to use Append[a, b] instead of Append[a, {el}]. It turns out that Append is another one of those unpack-eager functions, so using Join was critical. If we want Append, we must unpack to level 1 only manually: part[arr_, n_] := Append[ Developer`FromPackedArray[Partition[arr, n, n, {1, -1}], 1], Take[arr, -Mod[Length[arr], n]] ] A: I hesitated to post this as it is essentially a re-post of my answer to Reversibly merging sets of $k$ adjacent elements in an array but it occurs to me that this is a better place for that answer anyway. texts.full_text: A person desiring admission to an Indian university must pass this course, which can be considered as a degree bridge course to prepare students for university education. Admission to this course is based on marks obtained for the Secondary School Leaving Certificate, awarded after successful completion of five years of primary school, followed by five years of secondary school. The Indian education system follows a 10+2+3 (4 or 5) pattern, so that a bachelor's degree requires a minimum of 10 years of school, plus two years of PUC, plus either three, four or five years at university. Colleges offering a pre-university course are known as PU Colleges or Junior colleges in India. For example, the state of Karnataka co...nducts its own pre-university course examination, which is overseen by the Department of Pre-University Education (DPUE). Similarly, other states like Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, and Andhra Pradesh also have their own boards that conduct the PUC examinations. texts.full_text: om MS Teams?A: Unfunately, Microsoft Teams does not providea direct API for retrieving the availability status of a user in the same way that Skype for Business (Lync) did. However, you can use the Microsoft Graph API to achieve similar functionality. Here’s how you can do it: 1. Register an Application: First, you need to register your application in the Azure portal and grant it the necessary permissions to access user presence information. 2. Authenticate and Get Access Token: Use OAuth 2.0 to authenticate and obtain an access token for Microsoft Graph API. 3. Query User Presence: Use the Microsoft Graph API to query the presence status of a user. The endpoint you need is: ``` GET https://graph.microsoft.com/beta/users/{user-id}/presence ``` Replace `{user-id}` with the actual user ID or UPN(User Principal Name). Here’s a basic example in Python using the `requests` library: ```python import requests # Your Azure AD tenant and application details tenant_id = 'your-tenant-id' client_id = 'your-client-id' client_secret = 'your-client-secret' user_id = 'user@example.com' # User ID or UPN # Get an access token token_url = f"https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant_id}/oauth2/v2.0/token" token_data = { 'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': client_id, 'client_secret': client_secret,'scope': 'https://graph.microsoft.com/.default' } response = requests.post(token_url, data=token_data) access_token = response.json().get('access_token') # Query user presence presence_url = f"https://graph.microsoft.com/beta/users/{user_id}/presence" headers = { 'Authorization': f'Bearer {access_token}' } response = requests.get(presence_url, headers=headers) presence_data = response.json() # Extract availability status availability= presence_data.get('availability') print(f"User Availability: {availability}") ``` Note: The `availability` field can have values like "Available", "Busy", "DoNotDisturb", etc., which correspond to the user's status in MS Teams.Remember that Microsoft Graph API is continuously evolving, and you should refer to the [official documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/api/presence-get?view=graph-rest-beta&tabs=http) for the most up-to-date information and best practices. texts.full_text: gluconate (SAG). Resistance determinants in laboratory strains are partly known; however, the mechanism operating in field isolates is not well understood. In this study, we attempted to analyze the genetic polymorphism between SAG sensitive and resistant parasites using a total of 52 L. donovani isolates obtained either from bone marrow of VL patients or from skin lesions of post-KA dermatitis leishmaniasis (PKDL) patients. Genomic DNA was extracted from each isolate and subjected to PCR amplification using 15 microsatellite markers. The resulting PCR products were electrophoresed on a 6% polyacrylamide gel and visualized by silver staining. The results revealed a complete monomorphism between SAG-sensitive and -resistant isolates for all the microsatellite markers tested. This indicates that there is no significant genetic difference between the two groups of isolates. The findings suggest that the resistance to SAG in L. donovani isolates from India might not be due to genetic polymorphism. Instead, other factors such as environmental or host factors might play a crucial role in the development of antimony resistance in these parasites. Further studies are needed to explore the underly

texts.full_text: nome-Wide Association Analysis Identified Nine Skin DNA Methylation Loci for Psoriasis. Psoriasis is a chronic hyperproliferative and inflammatory skin disease caused by the interplay of genetic and environmental factors. DNA methylation has been linked to psoriasis, but the manner in which this process contributes to the disease is not fully understood. In this study, we carried out a three-stage epigenome-wide association study to identify disease-associated differentially methylated sites using a combination of 262 skin and 48 peripheral blood mononuclear cell samples. We not only revealed genome-wide methylation patterns for psoriasis but also identified strong associations between the skin-specific DNA methylation of nine disease-associated differeNine Skin (SSc) loci with type I diabetes mellitus, supporting our study's main results by connecting a decreased HLA/non–HLA contribution ratio and SSc pathogenesis. This evidence highlights clinical Ssc screening among T1D patients’ relatives who lack evident signs of musculoskeletal dysfunction due to Ssl after ruling out cardiac or malignant disorders through thorough evaluations like echocardiography along routine checkups for hidden tumours independent from radiographic suspicion levels suggested within dermatology textbooks available globall

texts.full_text: Craig Cooper Falls Into Shallow Waters Near The Christiansted Boardwalk And Drowns On Tuesday CHRISTIANSTED — A 61-year-old Ohio man who has been job hunting on St. Croix for at least a month was found drowned near the Boardwalk on Tuesday evening. Craig Cooper of Columbus was found floating in the shallow waters near the Christiansted Boardwalk some time before 8 p.m. on Tuesday. Bystanders pulled Cooper from the water when they spotted him and EMTs administered CPR in an attempt to resuscitate him, but they were not able to revive him. Cooper was pronounced dead by medical personnel on the scene. He was a guest at the King Christian Hotel for about three weeks. Witnesses told police that he left dinner Tuesday evening, but never made it back to the hotel after that. People who knew Cooper said that his job search was hampered by the fact that he was an end stage alcoholic who stayed drunk all day and all night. Eyewitnesses said that had multiple cuts on his head that had been sutured with stitches from the numerous falls that he incurred in the weeks leading up to his death because he had been drinking so heavily. When he first got to St. Croix in July, Cooperwas full of hope and optimism about finding a new job as well as enjoying life on this Caribbean island paradise for its beautiful beaches with warm weather year-round. However, Cooper's excessive alcohol consumption quickly became the central issue that affected his daily activities including searching jobs. Despite witness accounts indicating he had multiple falls due to heavy drinking, which resulted in head injuries and stitches needed later medical treatment. texts.full_text: true # Utils for testing AnyCable and its plugins require Certainly! Here's how the code snippet might look when completed: ```ruby frozen_string_literal: true module TestUtilsForAnycablePlugins require 'anycable/test_server' # Example utility function to start a test server for AnyCABLE. def self.start_test_anycable(server_port) Anwc.test { port: server_port } end # Function to stop the running anycable instance after tests are done def self.stop_any_cable_instance(port:, timeout:) Anncle.run do |instance| until (response = Net::HTTP.get_response(URI("http://localhost:#{port}"))) sleep 0.1 if response.nil? break unless ["running", "stopping"].include?(Anycable.status.read) raise TimeoutError, 'Timeout while waiting to shutdown anycable' \ .unless Time.now < timeout end rescue StandardError => e Anncle.shutdown(instance_pid: instance.pid) if %w(unreachable unknown). include?((instance && !(response&.is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess)))) || (e.is_a?(Errno)) # This is true for some errors, like file not found. end ensure Anncle.shutdown(instance_pid: instance.pid) if instance.nil? end end # module TestUtilsForAnycablePlugins ``` In this example: - `frozen_string_literal` directive ensures all strings in the Ruby source are immutable. This can help with performance and accidental mutations of global string constants. - The utility functions use AnyCABLE's provided test classes to start up a server instance specifically for testing, which is common when integrating Cable features. - Functions include stopping mechanisms ensuring resources (port/socket) get freed after tests

texts.full_text: y the accused Increases punishment for witness intimidation Lessens the requirements for a perjury conviction Support Proponents tout the bill as a welcome and needed step toward reducing witness intimidation, especially by gang members awaiting trial. Family members of gang violence victims praised the bill, and many were present at the Massachusetts State House for its passage into law. Opposition The ACLU and the Massachusetts Association of Criminal Defense Lawyers opposed sections of the bill that allow judges to bar defendants from seeing grand jury witness statements, and that reduce the requirements for a perjury conviction. Specifically, they point to a possible conflict with the 6th Amendment, which states in part: In all criminal prosecutions, the accused shall enjoy the right...to be confronted with the witnesses against him... It is the subject of continuing debate whether sections of the bill violate this Amendment. Southcoast Commuter Rail Rep. Canessa has expressed support for the expansion of the MBTA Commuter Rail into the Southcoast area including New Bedford, which is part of the district he represents. The federal Transportation Equity Act of 2005 set aside $20 million for the project, and in August of that year, Canessa joined area senators and representatives in urging Governor Romney to "make this project a legitimate, top priority." Invasive Weeds Long Pond and other water supplies in towns across Canessa's district have recently been noted as being overrun by invasive weeds such as milfoil. In 2005, acknowledging that these weeds can pose a risk to the environment and to the towns' drinking water, he supported studies into the weeds and their impact. Shane Keyser The Kansas City Star Missouri wide receiver Jimmie Hunt (88) caught a pass as Arkansas cornerback Tevin Mitchel dove for the tackle during their Nov. 28 game at Faurot Field in Columbia. The Tigers beat the Razorbacks 21-14 to claim their second consecutive SEC East Division Championship. Shane Keyser The Kansas City Star ATLANTA Missouri needed a spark offensively after...a slow start against Arkansas in the SEC Championship game. That spark came from an unlikely source: wide receiver Jimmie Hunt. Hunt, a junior from St. Louis, had been relatively quiet throughout the season, with only 12 receptions for 145 yards and no touchdowns coming into the game. But when the Tigers needed him most, he stepped up and delivered. In the second quarter, with Missouri trailing 7-0, Hunt caught a short pass from quarterback Maty Mauk and turned it into a 68-yard gain. The play set up a touchdown run by Russell Hansbrough, tying the game at 7-7. "I saw the cornerback playing off me, so I knew I had a chance to make a play," Hunt said after the game. "Maty threw a great ball, and I just did my best to get open and catch it." Hunt's big play seemed to ignite the Missouri offense. The Tigers scored 14 more points in the second half, with Hunt catching another pass for 15 yards to help set up a field goal. texts.full_text: ntals often prove more economical for travelers, particularly for stays exceeding a few nights. Unlike hotels, which offer limited space and are ideal for short, small-group trips, rental homes provide flexible layouts that accommodate larger families or groups on extended vacations. With kitchens, separate bedrooms, and living areas, they stretch budgets while fostering a home-like environment. This flexibility attracts budget-conscious travelers seeking both affordability and the freedom to customize their experience, making rentals increasingly preferable for long-term or multi-generation stays. A more suitable option for many travelers is to venture out and stay in a privately owned vacation condo or rental home. texts.full_text: disadvantages manifest themselves, too. Last week, field experts from the Long Island Department of Wildlife confirmed that a species of giant frog has moved into local waters. The frogs, which can move from salt to fresh water, have been captured in Bellmore, Long Beach and Merrick, and one juvenile was discovered in Woodmere Pond. Officials say the predator frogs most likely came into the country and the community through cargo that landed at JFK Airport. According to Dr. David Krause of Stony Brook University, the bad-tempered Beeizebuto, or “devil frog,” is the size of a beach ball, as tall as 16 inches and weighing up to 12 pounds. “These ceratophyrines are really aggressive, ambush predators,” Krause said. “They are round, with big mouths, and they will sit in wait and grab anything that walks by.” They can be found in the water or on land that surrounds ponds and lakes. One was found dead on the beach in Lido. texts.full_text: affecting primarily the surface. The clinical case involved a lens wearer who experienced a gradual discoloration, which was attributed to the adrenochrome staining. The staining was likely a result of the lens coming into contact with adrenochrome, a compound that can be present in the body in small amounts and can be released into the tear film. The laboratory model was developed to simulate and understand the staining process, which can be a concern for contact lens wearers and eye health professionals. The superficial nature of the staining in the laboratory model suggests that the discoloration can be reduced or prevented through better lens care and the use of lens materials that are less susceptible to staining.
